required_fields.description: The specific industry or sector being analyzed in the operational synergy example (e.g., healthcare, finance, retail).
The specific type of historical data being analyzed by the data scientist (e.g., medical charts, transaction logs, sensor readings).
The specific goal or risk factor being identified by the data science process (e.g., patient readmission, credit default, equipment failure).
The specific software or system environment where the AI model is deployed (e.g., hospital software, banking portal, manufacturing dashboard).
The end-user or personnel notified by the AI system (e.g., on-duty staff, loan officers, maintenance technicians).
